Core Architecture

Multi-Chain Supply.
Unified Credit Engine.

85%
◈

PAS Markets

Isolated borrow/lend markets for native Polkadot assets. Dynamic LTV up to 85%, real floating APY.

85%Max LTV
◎

Flashloan Shield

Manipulation-resistant v5 interest accrual. Protects the protocol from single-block price manipulation and flashloan attacks.

⇌

XCM Deposits

Bridge PAS from People Chain via native XCM.

⬡

ETH Bridge

Bring liquidity from different EVM chains into Polkadot Asset Hub. Minted 1:1 on-chain.

6T
⬥

Governance Rewards

Vote on Asset Hub governance and earn score multipliers. Consistency unlocks higher tiers permanently.

6 →Tiers
◇

mUSDC Markets

Bridged EVM USDC pools with real-time yield.

↻

KredioSwap

Swap PAS, mUSDC and lending positions atomically.

▲

Identity Boost

On-chain proofs permanently raise starting score.

⬡

AI Credit Engine

Six-tier dynamic credit scoring driven by on-chain behavior. Score improves in real time - no application, no waiting period.

◉

Neural Risk Layer

A dual-mode neural net runs alongside deterministic rules to catch manipulation and edge cases the rulebook misses.

Technical Specification

How It Works.

Scroll
◈

01. Credit Scoring Engine

The MechanismEvery user starts at Tier 0 (Anon) with a 30% LTV cap and 22% APY. The kredit_agent PVM contract continuously recomputes a score from 0–100 using six weighted behavioral signals: repayment streak, deposit magnitude, borrow frequency, liquidation history, account age, and governance participation. A single liquidation drops the score by 40 points.

The InnovationScore is computed entirely on-chain inside a PVM contract - no oracle, no off-chain backend, no trusted committee. Deterministic, auditable, and gas-efficient.

◉

02. Neural Scorer

The MechanismRunning in parallel, the neural_scorer PVM contract implements a 2-layer MLP. It normalizes behavioral features into weights to produce an independent neural score. It outputs Confidence % (agreement with deterministic score) and Delta from Rule (signed difference of performance vs rulebook).

The InnovationA user gaming rules (e.g., inflating streaks) shows a high deterministic score but low neural score - producing a large negative delta that flags manipulation. Pure on-chain smart contract resistance.

▲

03. Dynamic Risk Assessment

The MechanismThe risk_assessor PVM evaluates individual positions, predicting liquidation probability (0–100%) using: Debt-to-Collateral, Credit Score, and 7-day collateral price volatility trend. It outputs Risk Tier, blocks to liquidation, and required top-up amount to return to a Safe status.

The InnovationForward-looking, trend-aware risk scoring. Unlike standard DeFi models using only current price snapshots, Kredio risk reacts preemptively to falling, stable, or rising price vectors.

⬡

04. Autonomous Strategy

The MechanismYieldMind (PVM) evaluates market context (Utilization, Volatility, Avg Credit Score of borrower base) to output a reasoning_code. High utilization (>70%) halts deployment. High volatility reroutes to conservative yielding. Normal states scale allocations linearly based on borrower credit quality.

The InnovationYield strategy is dynamically coupled to the behavioral quality of borrowers. A feedback loop connecting protocol-wide credit health to external capital allocation routing.

⇌

05. Cross-Chain Settlement

The MechanismThe KredioXCMSettler handles XCM Transact payloads compounding atomic intents (Swap → Deposit → Borrow). The KredioAccountRegistry links SR25519 Substrate identities to EVM via cryptographic verification. KredioBridgeMinter provides lock-and-mint EVM bridging directly into protocol use.

The InnovationThe SR25519 ↔ EVM identity link means Polkadot on-chain identity (KILT credentials, parachain behavior) flows directly into credit scoring as a first-class primitive.

The Path to Diamond

Climb the Ladder.
Unlock Capital.

Kredio replaces fragmented identity with a unified on-chain reputation. Start at Anon with basic terms. Prove your reliability through repayments and governance. Unlock institutional-grade liquidity at Diamond.
